headline: Dominion Energy Weighs Offshore Wind Progress And 20 GW Storage Mandate
summary: Dominion Energy's Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project has surpassed 75% completion, with progress and budget outcomes improving versus prior expectations. Virginia has increased its grid scale energy storage requirement from 3 GW by 2035 to 20 GW by 2045, expanding potential regulated investment needs. These developments arrive as NYSE:D trades at $63.94, drawing fresh attention to the company's long term capital plans. Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) sits at the center of a fast evolving...

headline: Dominion Energy Inc (D) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Start with Operating Earnings ...
summary: Dominion Energy Inc (D) reports robust Q1 2026 results, driven by significant progress in renewable projects and strategic growth initiatives.
